signals.headline: Trump Announces Iran War Could End Soon Amid US Blockade and Vance-Led Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Iran War Could End Soon Amid US Blockade and Vance-Led Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**  
US President Donald Trump stated the conflict with Iran "can be over very soon" and "will end soon," predicting an "amazing two days ahead" without needing to extend the expiring two-week ceasefire, as US forces enforce a blockade on Iranian ports[2].  
This follows VP JD Vance leading US-Iran
